nodes.name: Daily 9AM Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every day at 9:00 AM IST. Change the cron to run more often e.g. '0 */6 * * *' = every 6 hours.

nodes.name: Get Watched Sites
nodes.notes: Fetches the list of active sites from GOB backend (FastAPI)

nodes.name: Scrape with Firecrawl
nodes.notes: Firecrawl scrapes the site and gives us clean Markdown text. Handles JS-heavy sites automatically.

nodes.name: Gemini AI Analysis
nodes.notes: Sends scraped content to Gemini 1.5 Flash for intelligent relevance analysis.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Alert
nodes.notes: Sends the formatted alert to your Telegram bot/group

nodes.name: Log Alert to Backend
nodes.notes: Saves a record of every alert sent. View at http://localhost:8000/alerts

nodes.name: Not Relevant - Skip
nodes.notes: Nothing relevant found on this site today. No action taken.

nodes.name: Alert Scrape Error
nodes.notes: Notifies you when a site couldn't be scraped (so you can manually check)
